label: Ritual attachable outcome effect
description: Defines a bonus outcome effect that can be attached to rituals matching the filter criteria.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class implementing the attachable outcome effect logic. Defaults to RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectWorker.

requiredMemeAny.label: Required meme (any)
requiredMemeAny.description: The ideo must have at least one of these MemeDefs for this effect to attach.

allowedRituals.label: Allowed rituals
allowedRituals.description: If non-empty, this effect can only attach to rituals in this list.

disallowedRituals.label: Disallowed rituals
disallowedRituals.description: This effect cannot attach to any ritual in this list.

requiredFaction.label: Required faction
requiredFaction.description: FactionDef that must exist on the map for this effect to attach.

onlyPositiveOutcomes.label: Only positive outcomes
onlyPositiveOutcomes.description: If true, this effect only applies when the ritual outcome is positive. Defaults to true.

onlyBestOutcome.label: Only best outcome
onlyBestOutcome.description: If true, this effect only applies for the best possible outcome.

onlyNegativeOutcomes.label: Only negative outcomes
onlyNegativeOutcomes.description: If true, this effect only applies when the ritual outcome is negative.

onlyWorstOutcome.label: Only worst outcome
onlyWorstOutcome.description: If true, this effect only applies for the worst possible outcome.

letterInfoText.label: Letter info text
letterInfoText.description: Localized text shown in the outcome letter when this attachable effect triggers.

effectDesc.label: Effect desc
effectDesc.description: Short localized description of the attached effect shown in ritual info.

new-attachable-outcome-effect.label: New ritual attachable outcome effect
new-attachable-outcome-effect.description: Minimal attachable outcome effect with a worker class.
